sourcesChecked.notes: Found electorate office street address (134 Main Road, Kumeu, Auckland 0810).
Donation link present but points to party-level donate page (https://www.national.org.nz/donate); no MP-specific donation method listed.

Parliament Office postal address (Private Bag 18888, Parliament Buildings, Wellington 6160) available on Parliament contact details section (kept electorate street address as better for physical mail).
